Neugebauer, co-founder and largest individual shareholder of Fermi America, Inc., has proposed a town hall webinar for June 30th where he, Governor Rick Perry, and other parties will answer questions from analysts and journalists about the company's past, present, and future. The proposed webinar comes after Governor Perry and the board gave themselves a 70% supermajority vote threshold, making it difficult for shareholders to change course.
